mapper.select: select * from exercise where subject = #{subject} order by rand() limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into exercise(title, content, difficulty, knowledge_point_id, file_url, subject, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer, analysis) values(#{title}, #{content}, #{difficulty}, #{knowledgePointId}, #{fileUrl}, #{subject}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{answer}, #{analysis})
